summary: Added a light temporal bridge into the Lausanne opening and changed the final beat so the chapter lands on an ordinary, public compromised normal instead of ending on a pure handoff hook.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to anchor the chapter more directly after Doha and smooth the entry from chapter 17's race aftermath.
Added a closing paragraph after the speaker-call pickup so the ending emphasizes the trio's ongoing lived state rather than only the next procedural step.
